message:
Fix SGR mouse motion event parsing and add scroll/input enhancements

Input Parser Changes:
- Fix mouse_sgr_drag test: renamed to mouse_sgr_moved and changed to use
  button code 35 (motion + no button) instead of 32 (motion + left button)
- Update parse_sgr_mouse to properly distinguish Moved (no button, code 35)
  from Drag (button held, code 32) by checking bits 0-1 for value 3
- Add horizontal scroll support (ScrollLeft, ScrollRight) for codes 66, 67
- Fix NUL byte handling (KeyCode::Null instead of Ctrl+Space)
- Add Backspace alternate (Ctrl+H, 0x08)
- Fix BackTab to use key_with_modifiers for proper modifier parsing
- Fix OSC parser to not include ESC in buffer when handling ST terminator

PTY Changes:
- Apply cargo fmt formatting fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
